We builddigitalproducts

We help teams launch MVPs, B2B platforms, and fintech/web3 products. We own product structure, UI/UX, and development so you reach a working release faster.

No extra noise: what kind of product it is, what we owned, what can already be opened online, and why the case is relevant to a similar brief.

B2B Platform

Transmatika

Live onlineDesignDevelopmentFleet Ops

A platform for transport companies with fuel cards, cost control, and a focused operational workspace.

Fuel cardsCosts & statusesB2B operations
Fast business proof
Coverage
13k+ service points
Support
24/7 for the team
Scope
4 automated zones
Role
Design + Development
How to review this case

The public B2B website is available online. We show the live team workflow on a call so the product is understood quickly without unnecessary NDA friction.

Open project onlinetransmatika.comContact us
Tap to load preview
Business task

Bring fuel card management, personalized benefits, cost visibility, and operational decision-making into one coherent product.

Key modules
Fuel card panelOperational statusesCost control blocksTeam workspaces
Why it matters

This case proves that we can structure dense B2B products so the interface accelerates the team instead of exhausting it.

Delivery format
DesignDevelopment

Top-10 TMA
Onboarding
10 likes to unlock
Monetization

Payment layer

The public project page is available online. We show the full in-product Telegram flow separately to focus on matching and retention logic.

Tap to load preview
Business task

Make profile discovery, matching, and first actions feel natural inside Telegram with as little friction as possible.

Key modules
TMA onboardingProfile feed and matchingReferral mechanicsPurchases via Telegram Stars
Why it matters

This case shows that we know how to design products with strong first-time experience where the interface immediately drives engagement.

Product UIGrowth UX

Networks
2 networks: EVM + TON
Product

Geography
Europe-ready flow
Flow

The public product surface is available online. Deeper exchange scenarios are better shown in a live demo so the key actions are experienced directly.

Tap to load preview
Business task

Design a clear product for buying, selling, swapping, card flows, bridge scenarios, and the admin side of the system.

Buy and sell flowsBridge and network swapWallet and card flowsAdmin panel
Why it matters

This case demonstrates our ability to design complex fintech interfaces that feel reliable and actionable instead of chaotic.

Product UIExchange UX

Private useStrategy settingsDense analytics
Fast business proof
Access
Private internal tool
Scope
3 working surfaces
Focus

How to review this case

This is a closed trading tool for private use. There is no public URL by design; we show the working flow on request or under NDA.

Request live demoPrivate / by requestContact us
Tap to load preview
Business task

Give the user a clean environment for strategy configuration and data reading without visual overload.

Key modules
TradingView-style chartStrategy settingsSignals and metricsTrader workspace
Why it matters

This case proves we can build closed-use tools where interface clarity directly supports faster decisions.

Product UIPrivate dashboard

Business task

Make the product feel fast, alive, and easy to understand without forcing users through too much setup.

Investment Product
Liquidity Pools
Business task

Pool overviewYield statesDeposit flowRisk visibility

This case demonstrates how we simplify DeFi interfaces and make investment products feel cleaner and more trustworthy.

Business task

Create a cleaner discovery environment for tokens so ranking, comparison, and voting remain readable despite high entity density.

Voting feedToken rankingsProject cardsDiscovery logic

This case is useful because it shows how we build order and hierarchy in interfaces where many entities compete for attention.

NFT Utility

Fungypack

Demo by requestDesignDevelopmentNFT Product

A platform that extends NFT utility without transferring assets and makes a technical mechanic feel more tangible.

NFT utilityNo asset transferConnection flow
Fast business proof
Role
Design + Development
Scope
4 core modules
Constraint
0 asset transfer
Access
Demo by request
How to review this case

The value of this case is best understood in a walkthrough rather than a public showcase. That is why we present it as a demo-by-request focused on the utility flow.

Request live demoDemo by requestContact us
Tap to load preview
Business task

Explain a complex NFT mechanic through a calm flow where the user connects an asset, sees utility, and acts without losing ownership control.

Key modules
Asset connectionUtility packagingOwnership-safe actionNFT management
Why it matters

This case shows we can package Web3 mechanics into a product that feels understandable instead of overly technical.

Delivery format
DesignDevelopment
